positive: A minimalist, high-contrast illustration of an abstract celestial body—a swirling galaxy captured within the silhouette of a sleeping animal, such as a fox or a stylized bear. The galaxy should be rendered in deep cosmic blues, violets, and shimmering magentas, while the animal silhouette is a solid, matte black or deep navy. Incorporate subtle gold foil accents simulating star dust and constellations. The style must be vector art mixed with watercolor wash gradients, resembling modern Nordic pet illustrations. Centrally composed, perfect for repeating pattern placement on clothing. Flat vector style, clean lines, graphic design, high detail, maximum clarity. --ar 1:1 --style clean --v 6.0
